heading: Removal of debtor as debtor in possession
label: 1204 Removal of debtor as debtor in possession

L. 109–8section 1201 of this titlesection 1201 of this title

children.label: a
children.text: On request of a party in interest, and after notice and a hearing, the court shall order that the debtor shall not be a debtor in possession for cause, including fraud, dishonesty, incompetence, or gross mismanagement of the affairs of the debtor, either before or after the commencement of the case.

children.label: b
children.text: On request of a party in interest, and after notice and a hearing, the court may reinstate the debtor in possession.
